_readme: Per-machine lens declutter + ordering. Copy this file to config/lens_filter.json and edit that one (it is git-ignored, so a price-list update pulled from GitHub never overwrites your choices, and the shared price files stay complete). TWO independent settings: (1) 'keep_only' maps a lens category to the ranges to keep — within that category only lenses whose brand+name contains one of the snippets survive; any category you leave out is shown in full, so an empty keep_only changes nothing. (2) 'preferred' floats your everyday lenses (the ones on your own price list) to the top of the library with a ★ — 'match' is a list of name snippets to boost, 'exclude' is snippets that veto a match. All matching is case-insensitive substring on brand+name, so 'Dynamic Prime' catches every index/coating/photochromic variant but not 'Dynamic Premium'. Example: "keep_only": { "Progressive": ["Dynamic Prime"] }, "preferred": { "match": ["Nulux", "Hilux"], "exclude": ["Sportive"] }. Categories in the price file: Single vision, Progressive, Occupational, Bifocal.
